reviews.review_description: I'm also having difficulty getting the shield up. It comes up when I'm doing other things and can't get to come up when I need it. I also can't figure out how to charge the cannon.  The tutorial you have reads like instructions on building a cabinet that came from China- meaning it's too basic and not intuitive. Please provide a better tutorial or I'll have to look it up on YouTube.
I absolutely love this game. Apart from having a little trouble with the fireballs, the game is fantastic. One of my current favorites.
Only had one go so not  got used to all spells yet but must say very impressed great graphics and gameplay look forward to having more time to get to grips with this game
I spend money to cast spells on gorilla's are you kidding me!?

This game does a phenomenal job of porting the core hand gesture based spell casting from the PC VR version of The Wizards to the single 3DOF controller for the Go/Gear VR.  All of the great gameplay from the main game is there including spell skill trees and variety, great voice acting and graphics and frantic battles against orcs.  It has leaderboards that will keep me practicing my wizarding technique as well.  A great value at just under $4 for a polished, action oriented game.
A good time filler. Easy to jump in and out; though sometimes the controls are not consistent.

Imagine you are a wizard and the last defense to an invasion of orcs, trolls, phantoms and other assorted minions of the dark. You have fireball, lightning and magic missile spells at your disposal.  You can level up various factors associated with them to increase damage, accuracy and speed. You learned how to cast these spells via a tutorial.  
Pros: Amazing Graphics (they really did an awesome job on this!), production value, atmospherics, story based

Cons: the controller is a little wonky to use and the instructions aren’t quite as clear as they could be, can get repetitive as all wave shooters can

If you like wave shooters, magic and all things D&D/Fantasy consider this game.


Note that I received this key for free from the Reddit giveaway.

While I enjoyed playing, the shield function just didn't seem to work for me. At least not first time, so I'd always take hits. Pity you can't map a function to the click button, which is unused. Click, shield, done.

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for playing and reviewing our game! We're sorry to hear about your issues with conjuring shield. We'll try to make it more reliable. We would like to avoid button pushing by any cause. The whole idea is to base the game entirely on hand gestures. Cheers!

Great game, thank you for adding more content. This is like a pc game on my go. Love this app!
I want play it dont instal

developer_response.body: Hey David. What phone model do you have?

reviews.review_description: Needs some training and practice but gives you challenge and great fun. Enjoy !

Thanks for the key! I have yet to try it really thoroughly so this might get edited in the future. Really interesting way to select spells! Really different from in Wands. It's a bit more immersive, but sadly also much much slower and less accurate. First thing I noticed is that it's really hard to aim the fireballs. It's a bit easier when it knows which target you're aiming at, but generally, it's hard to figure out how to do it with a 3DOF controller. That said, I probably couldn't do it better so take it with a grain of salt.
The power challenge had a bit of a bug. When it ends when you're throwing fireballs at it, the fireball keeps hopping up and down for a while in the place the red crystal used to be.
I'm not really sure yet about how much replay value this game will have but we'll see.
Tested on SM-N950F.

As I just bought a game an hour ago and can just play only one round. It seem to be a great game. To be fair I will give 5 stars for the part I've already play. Will write more review later.

Update: After a few more play this game really hurt my arm lol. To maintain your combo you need to switch between all spells. The gameplay is so simple just kill anything that move and block anything throwing at you. It would be cool if there a co-op mode or other game mode which you can move between position like Wands. And I'm not a fan of gate keeper game so lets those hords comes to attack me instead of running pass by.

And.. throwing fireball seem to fail oftenly. Bait style works a lot better on throwing things. Please fix.

This is my favorite game of the 20 or so I own in the Oculus Go. As others have mentioned, the controls can be hit or miss. I’ve found them to work well 90% of the time but still have issues with the fireball and shield spells even while trying to adjust my technique. Devs please fix this!

Overall all though very fun and a great value. This is what VR should be!

Very nice game with good graphics. Please patch the "FIREBALL-SPELL", which is not working correctly.

Edit
5 Stars for patching the FIREBALL - SPELL, which is now working correctly. Thanks!
Just bought follow the first review !!!
I enjoy the game mechanics & the ease of arcade style game play. The controls work perfectly. The game developer's did a great job!!! 👍👍

The controls are terrible. Aiming is achieved simply by looking at the enemy. But my fireballs go behind me 50% of the time. The lightning rarely activates. This would be fun if the gestures worked the same way every time.
The graphics are aweaome! If u like magic, get this game.
